title: Sullustan (starship)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Sullustan}}
'''''Sullustan''''' was a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] captained by [[T'nun Bdu]]. The ship was intercepted and destroyed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] when she found heavy weapons, communications equipment, and prefabricated building material that could be used to aid the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], as well as maps and information on the New Republic in its databanks.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']]
